raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Breed Street Shul is a historic landmark of major historical and cultural significance in Boyle Heights.",
    "The budget allocation of $14.9 million will completely transform the Breed Street Shul campus into a shared multipurpose space.",
    "The renovated Breed Street Shul will provide important services to the local community.",
    "The renovation plan for the Breed Street Shul includes converting the basement into offices for nonprofits serving the local community.",
    "The plan aims to create a large performance and meeting space in the former sanctuary of the Shul.",
    "A permanent exhibition will showcase the history of immigration to Boyle Heights through the perspectives of various communities.",
    "Improvements will be made for individuals with disabilities and seismic stability will be retrofitted into the Shul.",
    "The Breed Street Shul was a hub for Jewish life in Los Angeles from the 1920s through the 1950s.",
    "At one point, the Breed Street Shul was the largest Orthodox synagogue west of Chicago."
  ]
}
```
